description: Case style: Stainless steel circular case Dial style: Blue textured dial, steel colour hands with white accents, branding near the 12 and 6 hour mark, white and steel colour markings Strap style: Black and grey resin strap with a tang closure, holes for a customised fit Features: Analog watch, screw to reset time Water resistance: Up to 30 m Warranty: One year from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
